sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Terminology 61

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Terminology 61:1
items.html:
(to the question) Jerusalem
The discernment of the outer Yesod of Malchut is called Jerusalem. And the discernment of the Atara [crown] in her is also called Jerusalem, being the point of Malchut of the Nukva. (p. 780, Item 71; and p. 798, Item 95)
